tags.name: `mc-typeahead-multi-select`
tags.description:
Purpose: A typeahead multi-select (autocomplete) component that provides real-time suggestions as users type into an input field, and allows selection of multiple options that will be displayed as tags.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to provide users with suggestions based on their input.
When not to use: When you have a fixed set of options that do not change based on user input.
Works with components: mc-option, mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs
Alternative component names: Autocomplete, Search Suggestions, Predictive Search, Smart Search, Dropdown Search, Filtered Select

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-input is going out of focus.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-input click.

  * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed.

  * `clearbuttonclick` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when the clear button is pressed.

  * `search` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Fires when user starts typing (after specified number of minchar and debounce).

  * `optionselected` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fires when an option is selected.

  * `listscroll` {`CustomEvent`} - Fires when user scrolls to the bottom of the list.

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the mc-input.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-input.

Attributes:

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `selecteddata` {`any[]`} - Array of selected data that will be rendered as tags.
Can be set initially to pre-populate the component with selected options.

  * `hiddentags` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will hide tags with selected options.
This is useful when you want to keep the input clean and only show the selected options in the dropdown.

  * `clearalllabel` {`string`} - Label for the clear all filters button that appears when there are more than 2 selected options.
Set to empty string to disable the clear filters button.

  * `freetexttagging` {`boolean`} - Allows users to create custom tags by pressing Enter when the input doesn't match any dropdown option.
Custom tags can be dismissed without affecting the dropdown suggestion list.

Properties:

  * `enterKeyDisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `selectedOptions` {`IMcSelectOption[] | null | undefined`} - 

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `selectedSummaryId` {`"mc-typeahead-selected-summary"`} - 

  * `keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showlistonfocus` {`boolean`} - 

  * `selecteddata` {`any[]`} - Array of selected data that will be rendered as tags.
Can be set initially to pre-populate the component with selected options.

  * `hiddentags` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will hide tags with selected options.
This is useful when you want to keep the input clean and only show the selected options in the dropdown.

  * `clearalllabel` {`string`} - Label for the clear all filters button that appears when there are more than 2 selected options.
Set to empty string to disable the clear filters button.

  * `freetexttagging` {`boolean`} - Allows users to create custom tags by pressing Enter when the input doesn't match any dropdown option.
Custom tags can be dismissed without affecting the dropdown suggestion list.

  * `removeSelectedOption` - Callback function you can add to mc-tag

attributes.description:
`readonly` {`boolean`} - 

Property: readonly

Default: false

attributes.name: selecteddata
attributes.description:
`selecteddata` {`any[]`} - Array of selected data that will be rendered as tags.

Default:

attributes.description:
`hiddentags` {`boolean`} - If set to true, the typeahead will hide tags with selected options.
This is useful when you want to keep the input clean and only show the selected options in the dropdown.

Property: hiddentags

Default: false

attributes.name: clearalllabel
attributes.description:
`clearalllabel` {`string`} - Label for the clear all filters button that appears when there are more than 2 selected options.
Set to empty string to disable the clear filters button.

Property: clearalllabel

Default: Clear all

attributes.name: freetexttagging
attributes.description:
`freetexttagging` {`boolean`} - Allows users to create custom tags by pressing Enter when the input doesn't match any dropdown option.
Custom tags can be dismissed without affecting the dropdown suggestion list.

Property: freetexttagging

Default: false
